caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and modeling, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "fight clash," "leadership," "how people think," "we have a problem," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the connections and flow within this system. The setting suggests an educational or professional context, possibly aimed at teaching viewers about the intricacies of systems thinking and its applications in various aspects of life and society.
